refactor_steps.title: Redirect ComfyUI stdout/stderr to log file
refactor_steps.description: In the start() command, open ~/.config/parallax/comfyui.log in append mode before Popen. Pass the file handle as stdout and stderr to Popen (replacing subprocess.DEVNULL). Print the log path alongside the ready URL. Close the handle after Popen returns (child inherits it).

refactor_steps.title: Switch ready-polling to TCP connect with 0.5 s interval and 30 s default timeout
refactor_steps.description: Replace urllib.request.urlopen in _wait_until_ready with socket.create_connection(("localhost", port), timeout=1). Change time.sleep(1) to time.sleep(0.5). Lower _READY_TIMEOUT default from 60 to 30.

refactor_steps.title: Set cwd in Popen to ComfyUI root directory
refactor_steps.description: Add cwd=str(comfyui_main.parent) to the subprocess.Popen call in start() so ComfyUI runs from its own directory.

refactor_steps.title: Implement taskkill branch for Windows process termination
refactor_steps.description: In _terminate_process, update the win32 branch to call subprocess.call(['taskkill', '/F', '/PID', str(pid)]) instead of os.kill.

refactor_steps.title:
Adopt pid:\nport:

PID file format or document JSON deviation
refactor_steps.description: Either switch to the plain-text format specified in FR-4 and update _read_pid_file, or add a code comment explaining why JSON was chosen instead.

refactor_steps.title: Use platformdirs for config directory resolution
refactor_steps.description: Replace the hardcoded Path.home() / ".config" / "parallax" in _pid_file() with platformdirs.user_config_dir("parallax"). Ensure platformdirs is in project dependencies.
